modules.title: Introduction
modules.content: Web technology, Internet and WWW, website planning and design, HTML5 structure, formatting, lists, hyperlinks, images, tables, frames, forms, CSS, Bootstrap, JSON. (6 Hrs)

modules.title: Client-Side Technologies
modules.content: JavaScript: overview, data types, control structures, arrays, functions, scopes, objects, form validation. DOM: levels, objects, properties, methods, manipulation. (6 Hrs)

modules.title: jQuery
modules.content: Introduction, loading jQuery, selecting/changing/creating elements, event handling. (2 Hrs)

modules.title: Server-Side Technologies
modules.content: PHP introduction, syntax, control structures, functions, arrays, strings, file handling, sessions and cookies, error handling, MySQL with PHP. (6 Hrs)

modules.title: React
modules.content: Introduction, architecture, components, JSX, class and functional components, state and props, events, render function, forms, lists, router, flux. (4 Hrs)

modules.title: NodeJS
modules.content: Introduction, installation, Node modules, npm, web server, file system, ExpressJS, static resources, DB connectivity. (4 Hrs)
